purpose: Every `as never` in cli/src + mcp/src must be eliminated or annotated `KEEP as never` (documented generated-type bug). The residual unannotated budget ratchets to 0; the two forwarding seams (result.ts, output-schema.ts) are exempt by path.

wrapper.blockedBy: GENERATED wrapper/src/** only: noImplicitOverride -> TS4114 at src/errors/ClockifyApiError.ts + src/errors/ClockifyApiTimeoutError.ts (cause shadows Error.cause); exactOptionalPropertyTypes -> exactly 10 errors across src/api/errors/*, src/core/request.ts, src/errors/ClockifyApiError.ts. Hand-written root files are EOPT-clean (0 errors); enforced by the differential gate `tsc --exactOptionalPropertyTypes | grep -v ^src/ | grep -c error == 0`. The compile flag stays off because TS checks transitively-imported src/**; the durable fix is upstream in ../GOCLMCP/.
